blueprints.description: Registration and onboarding process for independent financial advisors with CID approval and mandate signing
Multi-level approval workflow with sequential/parallel approvers, delegation, auto-approve rules, timeout escalation, and audit history.
Event-driven automation engine that triggers actions based on record lifecycle events, field changes, time-based schedules, incoming messages, and external webhooks with condition filtering.
Batch update, delete, and export operations for large record sets with progress tracking, atomic or best-effort execution, and error logging.
Multi-step process for new clients to complete personal, contact, address, and employment details before account opening
Employee expense submission and approval workflow with multi-level authorization, reimbursement tracking, accounting journal entry generation, and payment processing.
Server-side Lua script execution providing atomic operations, programmatic logic, and access to all Redis commands within a single round-trip
Atomic multi-command execution with optional optimistic locking via WATCH; commands queued and executed sequentially without interruption
Built-in job queue with tasks, workflows, cron scheduling, retry with backoff, concurrency control, and sub-task orchestration
Purchase agreement management supporting blanket orders and calls for tender with vendor selection, purchase order generation, and supplier catalog synchronization.
Purchase order lifecycle from draft through receipt and billing to completion, with supplier validation, material request tracking, warehouse bin updates, and over-receipt tolerance enforcement.
Sales quotation-to-order lifecycle including quote creation, PDF generation, portal sharing, digital signature, prepayment, order confirmation, and invoicing.
Scheduled and on-demand report generation with PDF, Excel, and CSV output, background processing, caching, email delivery, and cron scheduling.
Sales order lifecycle from draft through delivery and billing to completion, with credit limits, blanket orders, stock reservation, and auto-status.
Calendar event management with bookings, availability tracking, recurring events (RRULE), conflict detection, timezone-aware storage, and configurable time slot granularity.
Generic state machine engine with named states, guarded transitions, entry/exit actions, history tracking, and lifecycle validation rules.
Support ticket management with SLA tracking, priority-based response/resolution deadlines, working hours calculation with holiday exclusions, and warranty claim handling.
Task lifecycle management with kanban board, subtask hierarchies, dependency tracking, priority-based scheduling, and workload balancing across assignees.
Maintenance scheduling and visit management with auto-generated visit dates, holiday avoidance, calendar events, and warranty status tracking for customer equipment.
Quality inspection for incoming, outgoing, and in-process materials with numeric range checks, formula-based acceptance criteria, and template-driven reading parameters.
Quality management with goals, periodic reviews, hierarchical procedures, feedback collection, and corrective/preventive action tracking for continuous improvement.
Project and task management with hierarchical tasks, dependency tracking, milestones, templates, and timesheet-based billable time tracking. Progress auto-calculated from tasks.
Consume and distribute real-time and delayed market data including pricing, indices, commodities, forex, and trade feeds from multiple providers
WCAG 2.1 AA compliance with keyboard navigation, focus management, ARIA attributes, skip links, screen reader support, contrast enforcement, and reduced motion preferences.
Accessible, composable UI component library built on accessible component primitives with variant system, Tailwind CSS styling, and a multi-style design system
Use one-off custom values in utilities without defining them in theme, enabling flexible styling beyond framework constraints
Chart rendering system with bar, line, pie, donut, area, scatter, time-series, and heatmap types, responsive sizing, tooltips, legends, and real-time updates
Pluggable component registration system with config-driven fields, slots, lifecycle hooks, and permissions
CLI tool for initializing projects, adding UI components from registries, managing migrations, and providing MCP server integration for AI assistants
Theme toggle supporting light, dark, and system-preference modes with CSS custom properties, user preference persistence, smooth transitions, and flash-of-wrong-theme prevention.
Configurable analytics dashboard with widget grid system, KPI cards, charts, date range selection, auto-refresh, and drill-down capabilities
Sortable, filterable, paginated data table with column management, row selection, inline editing, bulk actions, and CSV export
Drag-and-drop page composition system with nested zones, collision detection, and component reordering
Full online storefront with product catalog, category browsing, attribute filtering, shopping cart, multi-step checkout, payment integration, wishlist, and pricelist support.
Dynamic form creation and rendering with drag-and-drop field placement, conditional visibility, multi-step forms, validation rules, and versioning
Internationalization with locale switching, translation keys, pluralization, and RTL support
Hierarchical navigation with sidebar, breadcrumb, mega menu, and mobile support
Design responsive layouts using breakpoint variants to apply different styles at different screen sizes
Multi-viewport responsive preview with auto-zoom, manual zoom controls, and iframe-based isolated rendering
Customer self-ordering system supporting kiosk terminals and mobile QR-code ordering, with menu browsing, cart management, payment processing, and real-time order status updates.
Define and customize design tokens (colors, spacing, typography, breakpoints) that power a CSS framework
Transient toast/snackbar notifications with auto-dismiss, stacking, and accessibility
Build user interfaces by composing utility classes with variants and modifiers to generate CSS rules
Multi-step form and process wizard with progress indicator, step validation, skip optional steps, save progress, and resume later
Supplier performance scorecard system with weighted criteria, formula-based scoring, standing thresholds, automatic transaction blocking, and periodic score recalculation.
Shopping cart and checkout flow with stock reservation, guest cart merge, multi-step checkout, tax, promo codes, and order placement.
Convert amounts between currencies using live or cached exchange rates
Invoicing and payment lifecycle: customer invoices, vendor bills, credit notes, receipts, payment registration, multi-currency, and follow-up.
Loyalty and promotion engine supporting points, coupons, gift cards, discount codes, buy-X-get-Y offers, e-wallets, and next-order rewards.
Manage exchange rates, perform multi-currency transactions, and revalue accounts for unrealized foreign exchange gains and losses
Saved payment methods with card tokenization, add/remove/set default, Luhn validation, expiry monitoring, and digital wallet support.
Process incoming, outgoing, and internal transfer payments with multi-currency support, reference allocation, and automatic reconciliation
Point-of-sale system managing sales sessions, product orders, payment processing, cash register operations, receipt generation, and accounting integration.
Define and apply pricing rules, discount schemes, and promotional offers with priority-based conflict resolution, cumulative tracking, and free item support
Refund processing and return merchandise management with reason codes, approval workflow, partial/full refunds, and restocking.
Create, submit, and manage sales and purchase invoices with double-entry accounting, tax calculation, returns, and credit limit enforcement
Shipping rate calculation with zone-based pricing, dimensional weight, free shipping thresholds, carrier quotes, and delivery estimation.
Recurring subscription lifecycle with plan tiers, billing cycles, trials, proration, dunning retries, and cancellation handling.
Immutable, append-only audit trail with tamper detection and compliance-ready querying
Immutable field-level change tracking for any record with automatic capture on every write, configurable per-model opt-in, and sensitive field exclusion
Send transactional and system emails with template rendering, delivery tracking, and bounce handling
Real-time in-app notification center with read state, grouping, deep links, and persistent storage
Manage per-user notification preferences across channels and categories with quiet hours and frequency caps
Deliver mobile and web push notifications with device management, topic subscriptions, and rich media
Send SMS messages for OTP codes, alerts, and marketing with provider abstraction and compliance
Deliver outbound webhooks to external systems with signing, retries, and endpoint health monitoring
Hierarchical bill of materials defining raw materials, operations, and costs required to manufacture a finished good, with multi-level explosion and cost propagation.
Production planning tool that consolidates demand from sales orders and material requests, explodes multi-level BOMs, and generates work orders and procurement requests for manufacturing.
Subcontracting workflow for outsourcing manufacturing to suppliers, including raw material dispatch, finished goods receipt, quality inspection, rejection handling, and cost tracking.
Work order execution and job card tracking for manufacturing operations, including material transfers, time logging, sequential operation control, and production completion.
Landed cost allocation, stock reconciliation, and valuation reposting. Distributes charges across receipt items, adjusts stock quantities/valuations, and recalculates historical entries.
Pick list and shipping system with warehouse picking, delivery notes, shipment tracking, and delivery trip planning.
Serial number and batch tracking with lifecycle management, batch-wise valuation, expiry tracking, and serial/batch bundles.
Stock entry and material movement system supporting issue, receipt, transfer, manufacture, repack, and subcontracting with stock ledger and GL entries.
Warehouse hierarchy and bin management with nested trees, quantity tracking, putaway rules, and perpetual inventory GL integration.
Route, authenticate, rate-limit, and transform API requests through a centralized gateway with versioning, circuit breaking, and CORS support
Integrate CSS framework with build tools (PostCSS, CLI, Webpack, Vite, Next.js) to process templates and generate optimized CSS
Account management services for payment clearing houses — account mirroring, proxy management, real-time account verification, and check digit verification
Electronic Funds Transfer operations via clearing house platform — inbound/outbound credits, debits, returns, on-us debits, payment cancellation, and system error correction
Clearing house inbound payment processing — receiving credit transfers and direct debits from the national payment system
Clearing house outbound payment operations including credit transfers, bulk payments, direct debits, returns, and cancellations
Request-To-Pay (RTP) and refunds for clearing house payments — outbound/inbound RTP initiation, cancellation, and refund processing
Enterprise service client for connecting to Microsoft Dataverse, managing authentication, executing CRUD operations on entities, batch processing, and discovery of available organizations
Send transactional and marketing emails through a provider-agnostic abstraction supporting templates, attachments, delivery tracking, and batch sends
OAuth 2.0 authorization server for issuing tokens to third-party applications
Central message router resolving inbound messages to agents via binding precedence, role-based routing, and guild/channel/peer matching
Platform-agnostic messaging channel integration supporting Discord, Telegram, Slack, and 85+ platforms with unified message routing and delivery
Plugin registration, lifecycle management, and capability-based permissions system for extending OpenClaw functionality
Biometric scanning hardware integration for palm vein pattern registration, feature extraction, and 1:N template matching
Process payments through a provider-agnostic gateway abstraction supporting authorization, capture, void, refund, and webhook-driven status updates
Create and register plugins to extend CSS framework with custom utilities, variants, and theme values
Extensible plugin architecture with 12 UI override points, wrapping composition, field type customization, and sidebar panels
CLI tools for schema validation, formatting, generation, and database introspection
Real-time fire-and-forget message broadcasting with direct channel subscriptions and pattern-based subscriptions; sharded variant for cluster deployments
Stablecoin wallet infrastructure API — multi-chain wallets, addresses, deposits, withdrawals, swaps, gateway, checkout, and fiat offramp
Receive and process incoming webhooks from external services with signature verification (HMAC/RSA), replay protection, idempotent deduplication, and async handler routing
Multi-tier caching with read-through, write-through, write-behind, and cache-aside strategies, stampede protection, and configurable invalidation
Manage object storage across cloud providers with upload, download, delete, presigned URLs, multipart upload, and lifecycle policy support
Data durability via RDB snapshots and/or AOF journaling; recover to point-in-time or exact command sequence after crash
One-way data synchronization from master to replicas; full or partial resync with command streaming and replication backlog
Process asynchronous jobs and events through a provider-agnostic message queue supporting publish, subscribe, acknowledge, retry with backoff, and dead-letter queues
Sentinel: automatic failover and monitoring; Cluster: distributed sharding across multiple nodes with gossip protocol
Self-service appointment scheduling with availability slot management, email verification, agent assignment, and calendar event integration.
Marketing campaign definition and email drip campaign execution with scheduled delivery, recipient tracking, and unsubscribe management.
Contract lifecycle management with signing workflow, date-driven status transitions, fulfilment tracking, and template-based term generation.
Lead capture, qualification, and opportunity pipeline management with conversion tracking from initial contact through to customer creation.
Bank reconciliation with statement import, auto/manual matching, reconciliation models, partial/full tracking, and write-off management.
Threaded comments on any entity (polymorphic) with rich text, @mentions, reactions, edit windows, and rate limiting
Hierarchical content tree with zone-based storage, tree walking, flattening, indexed lookups, and schema migration
Customer and supplier master data management with credit limits, territory and group hierarchies, portal access, lead conversion, internal parties, and supplier hold/block controls.
Bulk data import and export supporting CSV, Excel, and JSON formats with column mapping, row validation, background processing, and configurable error handling
Store, retrieve, manage, and generate documents with metadata, permissions, version control, and dynamic PDF generation
Centralized state management with sliced architecture, action dispatching, computed selections, and public API
Submit and approve employee expense reports with receipt validation
Per-field-type transformation pipeline with read-only path resolution, async tracking, and trigger-based caching
Cloud storage abstraction with signed URLs, virus scanning, content type validation, checksum deduplication, and multi-provider support
Manage hierarchical chart of accounts and post double-entry general ledger entries with period controls, cost center tracking, and party-level accounting
Ordered collection with efficient head/tail insertion, removal, and range queries; supports blocking operations and atomic moves between lists
Persistent conversation storage with automatic disk budgeting, transcript rotation, and session lifecycle tracking across messaging channels
Cursor-based and offset-based pagination with configurable page sizes, stable sorting, and Link header support for REST APIs
Full CRUD operations for document collections with pagination, filtering, hooks, bulk operations, and field selection
Automatic document locking to prevent concurrent editing with configurable lock duration and override capability
Singleton document management for site-wide settings, navigation, headers, and footers with versioning and access control
Per-user preferences storage for admin UI state including collapsed fields, tab positions, column visibility, sort order, and list view settings
File upload system with image resizing, focal-point cropping, MIME validation, cloud storage adapters, and range request support
Document versioning with draft/publish workflow, autosave, version history, restore, scheduled publishing, and locale-specific status
Retrieve, manage, and report on investment portfolio holdings, positions, valuations, and transaction history
Execute type-safe database CRUD operations with Prisma Client query builder
Manage database schema versioning and evolution with safe migrations
Define application data models with fields, types, relationships, and validation rules in Prisma schema
Product configuration with attributes, variant generation, exclusion rules, dynamic pricing, visual pickers, custom inputs, and matrix bulk ordering.
Creation, management, and approval workflow for investment proposals and quotations delivered to clients
Full-text search with faceted filters, sorting, relevance scoring, fuzzy matching, and saved searches
Unordered collection of unique elements with set algebra operations (union, intersection, difference) and cardinality counting
Trash/archive/restore pattern with soft deletion, configurable retention periods, automatic purging, and cascade rules for related records
Sorted collections with ranking and scoring; nested key-value maps with field-level operations and optional TTL per field
Append-only event log with monotonically increasing IDs, consumer groups for distributed processing, and automatic acknowledgment tracking
Store and retrieve arbitrary-length string values with atomic increment, decrement, append, and range operations
Tags, labels, and hierarchical categories for organizing entities with tag groups, colors, slug auto-generation, and category depth limits
Tax engine with percentage, fixed, division, group, and formula-based tax types, repartition, cash-basis accounting, and fiscal position mapping.
Linear history stack with debounced recording, forward-branch destruction, and keyboard shortcut navigation
Asset maintenance scheduling and repair management with preventive and corrective tasks, repair cost capitalization, and stock consumption tracking for parts used during repairs.
Fixed asset lifecycle management covering registration, multi-book depreciation, asset movements, value adjustments, disposal, and capitalization with automatic GL entries.
Create, rotate, revoke, and scope API keys for programmatic access
Palm vein biometric authentication — alternative to password login with enrollment of up to 2 palms per user
Verify user email ownership via a one-time token link
Authenticate a user with email and password
End a user session and clear all authentication tokens
Passwordless email login via single-use magic links
Second-factor authentication via TOTP, SMS OTP, or backup codes
Social sign-in via OAuth2/OIDC with account linking and profile sync
Allow users to reset their password via email verification
Full authentication system with JWT sessions, API keys, account locking, email verification, and custom strategies
Active session listing, device tracking, and session revocation
Register a new user account with email and password
Enterprise SSO via SAML 2.0 and OIDC with JIT provisioning
Multi-provider AI model integration with fallback chains, cost tracking, streaming, and extended thinking support
GDPR/CCPA compliance with consent management, data export, right to erasure, and cookie consent
Multi-mode gateway authentication with rate limiting, device tokens, and Tailscale VPN integration
Function-based access control with collection-level, field-level, and document-level permissions supporting boolean and WHERE clause results
Configurable request throttling with multiple scopes and algorithms to protect APIs from abuse
Role-based access control with hierarchical permission inheritance
Multi-tenant organization and team management with member invitations and data isolation
